description_long: This is a cylindrical wooden barrel with horizontal planks and a dark, flat top and bottom. The wood appears weathered and aged, with a natural grain and some discoloration, suggesting outdoor exposure. A prominent label featuring a black bottle silhouette inside a red-bordered white shape is affixed to one side, indicating it may contain or have contained hazardous or notable contents. The barrel lacks visible handles or metal hoops, giving it a simple, rustic appearance. The construction suggests it is hollow and could be used for storage or as a receptacle. Its size and robust build make it suitable for use in urban or industrial settings, such as alleys, warehouses, or construction sites.
description: A weathered wooden barrel with a dark top and a label showing a black bottle symbol, lacking visible handles or metal hoops.
description_view_0: Front view showing the label with a black bottle symbol on the wooden surface.
description_view_1: Side view with the label partially visible on the left edge, showing the wood grain and plank construction.
description_view_2: Rear view with no label or markings, just the continuous wooden planks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the label's edge barely visible on the right, highlighting the barrel's cylindrical shape.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: label with black bottle symbol in red-bordered white shape
